idea-plugin.name: Rainbow Classes
idea-plugin.description:
Rainbow Classes adds a small deterministic color marker to every PHP class, interface, trait, and enum, making it easier to navigate large codebases with many open files.

Features
  • Colored badge overlaid on file icons in tabs and the project tree
  • Colored stripe in the editor gutter on the class declaration line
  • Deterministic colors derived from the fully qualified class name — consistent across sessions
  • Four palettes: Default, Pastel, High Contrast, Synthwave
  • Live palette reload — no IDE restart required
  • Original IntelliJ icons are preserved; only a small badge is added
Why use it?

When many files are open, tabs are hard to tell apart by name alone. Rainbow Classes gives each class a unique visual fingerprint, reducing the time spent searching for the right tab.
